creator: igoro@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a feeling that this one could be closed, because of:
- Jamie provided the outline of the idea behind the security.jail.param.* values, which are merely "a catalogue", not real values.
- And the fix, or better to say the solution, can be found in 15-CURRENT, which introduces real values at security.jail.children.*. I'm not sure about the schedule, but there is a chance it will hit 14.2-RELEASE, as its MFC is planned to happen around the code slush time.

Does it help?
